task: Ralph R12 (2026-05-15): zap all remaining unfixed bugs from R10/R11 carry-over + any new bugs surfaced during retest. Rate limits stay OFF on dodev for QA; NO security weakening. Use sonnet agents for testing, opus agents for root cause + fix. Commit, push, merge to main if local, deploy to dev (dodev.fid.pw), re-verify. Never bind 0.0.0.0. Never touch prod.

stories.title: Inventory all R10/R11/R12 bug files + live-test dev to determine still-open set
acceptanceCriteria: Each BUG-R10-*, BUG-R11-* bug file is read and its current status (FIXED|OPEN|WONTFIX|RETESTED) recorded in testcases/99-runlog/R12-STATUS.md
Live tests against https://dev-api.doable.me probe each open bug's repro path and record HTTP status + body excerpt
Output: deterministic list of bugs that are still reproducible vs already-zapped

stories.title: Confirm dodev rate-limit posture: rate limits OFF; security features ON
acceptanceCriteria: SSH to dodev.fid.pw, inspect /root/doable/.env for RATE_LIMIT_DISABLED or per-limiter overrides
Confirm RATE_LIMIT_DISABLED=true (or equivalent) is set; rate limiters return 200 not 429 during QA matrix
Verify security features remain ON: CORS allowlist enforced, MFA + RLS + JWT verify + CSP all active
Document the posture in testcases/99-runlog/R12-RATELIMIT-POSTURE.md

stories.title: Root-cause + fix BUG-R11-PDF-ATTACHMENT-IGNORED-001 (P1) — verify fix branch lands on dev
acceptanceCriteria: fix branch fix/r11-pdf-attachment-prompt-and-persist (fecc8c1c) reviewed for completeness against the Opus root-cause doc
Migration 083 (workspace_id on ai_sessions) confirmed clean + idempotent
scripts/r11-pdf-attach-test.ts re-runs against dev showing pdf_text_detected_in_prompt: true AND App.tsx derived from SRS content (not splash)
ai_sessions table has rows for the test session (admin/chat history shows the session)

stories.title: BUG-R10-AUTH-PASSWORD-RESET-404-001 — re-verify /auth/password-reset 200 on dev post-deploy
acceptanceCriteria: fix consolidated in 7dfd654b on the current branch; verified merged or cherry-picked into main
POST https://dev-api.doable.me/auth/password-reset with {email:'qa-owner@doable.test'} → 200 (anti-enumeration envelope)
Body NEVER reveals whether email exists
Rate limit honoured at 4th call → 429 (if rate limits re-enabled) — but during R12 QA limits are off

stories.title: BUG-R10-MFA-ENROLL-500-DOABLE-KEK-001 — verify dev has DOABLE_KEK set + boot fail-fast works
acceptanceCriteria: ssh dodev grep DOABLE_KEK /root/doable/.env → returns a 64-char hex value
POST /auth/mfa/enroll/start with valid JWT → 200 (not 500) with QR + secret
Body contains NO 'DOABLE_KEK' literal string (no env-name leak)
Boot logs show 'KEK loaded successfully' (or no boot panic)

stories.title: BUG-R10-PROJECT-FILES-EMPTY-200-001 + BUG-R11-SEC-RLS-PROJECT-FILES-200 — verify 404 on unknown project
acceptanceCriteria: fix consolidated in 15bf9ad9 on the current branch; verified merged or cherry-picked
GET /projects/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000/files with valid qa-owner JWT → 404 (not 200 empty)
GET /projects/<other-tenant-project>/files with qa-owner JWT → 403 or 404 (cross-tenant blocked)
GET /projects/<own-project>/files with qa-owner JWT → 200 with the project's files

stories.title: BUG-R11-VERSIONS-EACCES-500-001 — verify fix landed + 500 with /boot/lost+found leak gone
acceptanceCriteria: fix branch fix/r11-versions-projectpath-server-derived (76fe7b6) merged or cherry-picked
POST /projects/<id>/versions with body {projectPath:'/'} → 400 or 403 (NOT 500)
Response body NEVER contains /boot, /etc, /var, /root, EACCES, ENOENT path leaks
Normal /versions POST without projectPath continues to work for scaffolded project

stories.title: BUG-R10-TRAILING-SLASH-AUTH-DROP-001 (P2) — root-cause + fix the 308 redirect Authorization-strip
acceptanceCriteria: Opus analyses the 308 redirect: confirm whether Hono trailingSlash + Cloudflare Tunnel + Node fetch is dropping Authorization header on cross-origin or same-origin redirect

Choose the right fix: either disable trailing-slash redirect in Hono (return 404 vs redirect for /templates/), OR set HSTS-style canonical path early, OR document explicitly as a Node-fetch behaviour with no API-side fix

Probe: GET /templates with Authorization → 200; GET /templates/ with Authorization → either 200 or 308 to /templates BUT clients with proper redirect handling (curl -L, browser fetch) still authenticate
Document the chosen fix in BUG-R10-TRAILING-SLASH-AUTH-DROP-001.md with the trade-off rationale

stories.title: BUG-R10-AUTH-LOGOUT-ANON-200-001 (P3) — make a product call + apply
acceptanceCriteria: Triage note 297b5271 reviewed for the existing product call
Either: require auth on /auth/logout returning 401 for anon, OR explicitly document idempotent logout 200 as intentional in routes/auth.ts + add a unit test pinning the contract
Acceptance: contract is pinned with a test; behaviour matches the docs

stories.title: Commit, push, merge consolidated fixes into main; deploy dev
acceptanceCriteria: All open fix branches either merged to main via PR or rebased into a single deploy branch
git push origin main updated with all merged fixes
ssh dodev cd /root/doable && git fetch && git checkout main && git pull (or equivalent) executed (with user approval)
pnpm db:migrate run on dev to apply migration 083 (and any pending)
tmux doable session restarted (api/web/ws windows) — services up on 127.0.0.1 only
ss -tlnp on dodev shows NO 0.0.0.0 binds

stories.title: Final regression — re-run R10/R11 matrix vs dev; zero P0/P1 left
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/r10-api-matrix.ts re-run vs https://dev-api.doable.me → 5xx count = 0; UNEXPECTED count for previously-fixed bugs = 0
scripts/r11-pdf-attach-test.ts re-run → pdf_text_detected_in_prompt: true AND non-splash App.tsx
ai_sessions admin view shows the recent test sessions (not empty)
All BUG-R10-*/BUG-R11-* status updated in their .md files: FIXED + verified, or WONTFIX with rationale, or carried over to R13 with explicit reasoning
